Complementary builders

You two are circling the same problem from opposite directions.

Alexis builds the technical side of emotionally intelligent social AI. Haley studies why human connection fails in digital spaces. Together they'd cover both the build and the empathy layer.

Suggested opener

"I heard you think most networking apps are emotionally tone-deaf — I've been trying to fix that for six months. Where did you land?"
